# Habib Al-Shaikh

CS student at Imam Abdulrahman Bin Faisal University (IAU), graduating 2027. Specializing in embedded systems, SCADA, and low-level programming. Based in the Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia.

## About

I work close to the metal — C++, embedded systems, and anything that talks directly to hardware. Building toward a career in SCADA and industrial systems in the Eastern Province, where that work actually happens. Native Arabic speaker, working English.

## Skills

C/C++, Java, Python, Linux, MySQL, TCP/IP, Git/GitHub, Neovim, ESP32

## Projects

- CLI_Log_Analyzer: A CLI tool that parses and filters Linux log files. https://github.com/HabibAlShaikh/CLI_Log_Analyzer
- ESP32-ELM327-WiFi-Logger: ESP32 firmware that connects to an ELM327 WiFi OBD-II adapter and logs real-time vehicle data to CSV over SD card. https://github.com/HabibAlShaikh/ESP32-ELM327-WiFi-Logger
- ghos: A group project — secure e-commerce platform for digital game keys. https://github.com/mkm72/ghos

## Certifications

Cisco Networking Basics

## Availability

Seeking co-op or internship in embedded systems, SCADA, or IoT. Prefer Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia. Open to remote.
